hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -and (Test-Path $fp)) { $dir = 'E:\venture\proposal\JBLab\2nd\backup'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force | Out-Null }; $date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $name = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileName($fp); Copy-Item $fp (Join-Path $dir ($date + '_' + $name)) }
